final_acceptance_policy: Stage-local PASS proves synthetic/local Stage 4 boundaries only; protected real templates, production Secrets, real private-repository recovery, fourteen elapsed observation days, publication, deployment and final review remain PARTIAL or NOT_RUN.

acceptance_contracts.title: 全类型唯一分类与 VERIFIED_UNKNOWN 保留
acceptance_contracts.environment: verified synthetic Canonical Raw and synthetic evidence-backed classification registry; no production message
acceptance_contracts.input: one synthetic verified fixture for every frozen document class plus one unmatched verified template
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Each evidence-backed fixture receives exactly its frozen class; an unmatched verified fixture receives VERIFIED_UNKNOWN and remains eligible for encrypted Raw retention.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: synthetic class coverage 18/18; dropped verified messages 0; production classification rules 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep the production registry empty and degrade verified unmatched messages to Raw-only VERIFIED_UNKNOWN.

acceptance_contracts.title: 统一私有 Document Envelope 与字段血缘
acceptance_contracts.environment: verified synthetic Canonical Raw, encrypted Raw plan and deterministic UTC clock
acceptance_contracts.input: synthetic verified message with labels and an inspected attachment plus conflicting lineage control
acceptance_contracts.oracle: One opaque source binds Raw digests, registry versions, UTC and Australia/Sydney time, labels, attachment object IDs, processing state and non-conflicting field origins; diagnostics redact private values.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: synthetic lineage completeness 100%; UTC/Sydney conversion errors 0; lineage conflicts accepted 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Block Processed creation for the source and retain only encrypted Raw.

acceptance_contracts.title: Daily Monthly Contract Note 受保护 Profile 解析
acceptance_contracts.environment: bounded in-memory synthetic CSV fixtures and exact synthetic parser profiles
acceptance_contracts.input: Daily, Monthly and Contract Note rows plus conflicting protected-field control
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Exact labels produce canonical dates, currency, decimals, generic rows and field origins; repeated builds produce identical JSONL and Parquet; conflicts quarantine with no statement.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: synthetic valid parses 3/3; deterministic byte mismatches 0; conflicting-field guesses 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Disable the affected profile, retain encrypted Raw and record a blocked or safe-deferred state.

acceptance_contracts.title: FY Summary 通用表格与无 Portal 边界
acceptance_contracts.environment: bounded read-only synthetic XLSX fixtures; no network or Portal adapter
acceptance_contracts.input: valid FY workbook, table-only profile and workbook formula control
acceptance_contracts.oracle: The valid workbook parses exact fields and negative numeric values in memory, table-only output is supported, formulas quarantine, and no Portal access path exists.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: synthetic valid table parses 2/2; formula interpretations 0; Moomoo Portal calls 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Disable XLSX processing, preserve encrypted Raw and remove any out-of-scope Portal surface.

acceptance_contracts.title: PDF Password 显式等待与受保护重处理
acceptance_contracts.environment: synthetic AES-256 PDF and in-memory Secret controls
acceptance_contracts.input: same encrypted PDF with absent, incorrect and correct synthetic Secrets
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Absent and incorrect Secrets produce WAITING_FOR_PDF_PASSWORD with no artifact or structured statement; the correct explicit Secret reprocesses the same Raw to COMPLETE without password disclosure.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: incorrect structured parses 0; brute-force attempts 0; correct synthetic reprocess 1/1
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep WAITING state and prohibit parser output until a protected exact Secret is supplied.

acceptance_contracts.title: Parser Blue-Green 版本不可变与 current CAS
acceptance_contracts.environment: official age CLI, in-memory append/CAS ciphertext store and pre-network GitHub guard
acceptance_contracts.input: same Raw under parser v1/v2, 13/14-day controls, semantic-change approval controls, retry and SHA path controls
acceptance_contracts.oracle: v1 remains immutable, v2 appends, current stays unchanged before day 14, equivalent output promotes by exact CAS, changed output needs a bound signed approval, retry converges, and SHA updates are allowed only for the encrypted current path.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: Processed overwrites 0; premature promotions 0; unapproved changed promotions 0; plaintext persistent objects 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep current on the incumbent parser and isolate the candidate version for investigation.

acceptance_contracts.title: 严格公开桶化 Inventory 与诊断状态
acceptance_contracts.environment: synthetic private observations and in-memory HMAC key; no public write
acceptance_contracts.input: exact private counts, timestamps and roots plus all fail-closed public run states
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Output contains only allowlisted datasets, schema/parser versions, availability, count/freshness buckets, conclusion and next-action enums and an opaque HMAC root; private details do not appear.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: forbidden public fields 0; exact private values disclosed 0; diagnostic state/action coverage 100%
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Block public publication and preserve private encrypted data until the renderer and leak scan pass.
